title: Component Certification Gates And Release Readiness Scoring

certification_checklist.description: Every component MUST pass all gates before entering stable release

criteria.description: All interactive elements keyboard-accessible
WCAG AA color contrast (4.5:1 normal, 3:1 large)
Screen reader tested (VoiceOver + TalkBack + NVDA)
criteria.evidence: Screen reader test matrix signed off

criteria.description: Focus management correct (no focus trap, logical tab order)
aria-live regions for dynamic content
Touch targets minimum 44x44px on mobile
All user-visible strings externalized to locale files
Date/time/number formatting uses Intl API or equivalent
Pluralization rules correct for test locales (en, ar, zh, ru)
No string concatenation for sentences (use ICU MessageFormat)
Tested with longest locale strings (de-DE) — no overflow/truncation
Layout mirrors correctly with dir='rtl'
Logical CSS properties used (margin-inline-start, not margin-left)
Directional icons mirrored appropriately
Text input direction correct for mixed LTR/RTL content
criteria.evidence: Manual test with Arabic + English mixed text

criteria.description: Initial render within budget (see responsive-layout-standards.json)
Scroll performance ≥ 60 FPS on mid-tier device
No memory leaks (stable heap over 5-minute session)
Virtualization implemented for lists > 50 items
Lazy loading for media and heavy sub-components
Bundle size contribution within budget
Unit test coverage ≥ 80% (lines)
Integration tests cover all API/socket dependencies
criteria.evidence: Test matrix cross-referenced with component catalog

criteria.description: Contract tests bind emitted/consumed events to canonical schemas
Visual regression tests for all viewports defined in layout standards
criteria.evidence: Visual diff report (Storybook Chromatic or equivalent)

criteria.description: Error/fallback paths tested (API down, socket disconnect, empty state)
criteria.evidence: Test cases for each fallback_behavior in component catalog

criteria.description: No XSS vectors (all user content sanitized/escaped)
No sensitive data in component state/props that could leak to logs
File upload components validate file type and size client-side
No direct DOM manipulation bypassing framework sanitization

contract_test_generation.description: Automatically generates contract tests binding component events to canonical schemas

rules.description: For every event in events_emitted, generate a test that verifies the emitted payload matches the canonical schema in packages/realtime-contracts

steps: 2. Trigger user action that emits the event
4. Validate payload against JSON schema from realtime-contracts
5. Assert validation passes with zero errors

rules.description: For every event in events_consumed, generate a test that verifies the component correctly handles the canonical event shape

steps: 2. Inject mock event matching canonical schema
4. Assert UI reflects the event (snapshot or assertion)

rules.description: For every event in events_consumed, generate a negative test with malformed payload

steps: 2. Inject event with missing required fields
3. Assert component does not crash (error boundary not triggered)

automation.trigger: CI pipeline generates contract tests from component-contract-catalog.json + realtime-contracts schemas
automation.output: tests/contract/ directory with generated test files
automation.regeneration: On any change to component catalog or realtime-contracts schemas

wave_readiness_scoring.description: Composite score determining whether a wave is ready for production rollout

dependency_readiness.calculation: Percentage of blocking dependencies resolved (from feature-rollout-governance.json)
dependency_readiness.note: ALL blocking dependencies must be resolved — no partial score

component_certification.calculation: Average certification score across all components in the wave
component_certification.note: Weighted average of gate scores (a11y, i18n, rtl, perf, test, security)

contract_test_pass_rate.calculation: Percentage of generated contract tests passing

operational_risk.calculation: Inverse risk score: deducts points for known issues, tech debt, missing monitoring

visibility.dashboard: Wave Readiness Dashboard showing per-wave score breakdown
visibility.ci_output: Wave readiness score printed in CI pipeline summary for every merge to main

escalation_policy.description: Process when component dependencies lag behind planned feature wave timeline

actions: Notify dependent team leads via Slack/Teams channel

tiers.trigger: Dependency delivery delayed by 2-4 weeks OR blocks other waves
actions: Explore stub/mock alternatives for unblocking frontend work
Consider partial wave rollout (ship non-blocked components)

tiers.trigger: Dependency delivery delayed by > 4 weeks OR critical path impacted

tracking.tool: JIRA / Linear — escalation tickets with tier label and SLA timer
tracking.review_cadence: Weekly in sprint planning, daily during Tier 2+
tracking.resolution_criteria: Dependency delivered and integrated, or alternative approach approved
